sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1434" key="a)doia/stws" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδοιάστως</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">δοιάζω</etym>) <sense id="n1434.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without doubt</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0237.tlg001:95" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anacr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">95</biblScope></bibl>.
